description:
The ButtonDynamicImpulseTrigger component sends Dynamic Impulses to flux node receivers. This acts like a combination of Button Events & Dynamic Impulse Trigger ProtoFlux nodes, but as a component instead.

}}

fields.Target: The slot hierarchy to send this impulse through. If this is null, it will pulse through root instead.
fields.ExcludeDisabled: If true, this pulse will ignore disabled slots.
fields.PressedTag: When the button is pressed, send a pulse for receivers looking for this tag.
fields.PressingTag: When the button is pressing, send a pulse for receivers looking for this tag.
fields.ReleasedTag: When the button is released, send a pulse for receivers looking for this tag.
fields.HoverEnterTag: When the button just began to hover, send a pulse for receivers looking for this tag.
fields.HoverStayTag: When the button is hovering, send a pulse for receivers looking for this tag.
fields.HoverLeaveTag: When the button has stopped hovering, send a pulse for receivers looking for this tag.

usage: Useful for sending dynamic pulses cleanly instead of using flux.
